/usr/bin/ar qc libnebu_audio.a CMakeFiles/nebu_audio.dir/SoundSystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nebu_audio.dir/Source.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nebu_audio.dir/Source3D.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nebu_audio.dir/SourceCopy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nebu_audio.dir/SourceEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nebu_audio.dir/SourceMusic.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nebu_audio.dir/SourceSample.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nebu_audio.dir/audio_system.c.o CMakeFiles/nebu_audio.dir/music_rwop.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libnebu_audio.a
